patterns_recognized: D-grade dual-opposing-signal (SP xERA AND PQI both against the pick) fires across 6 games today — per archive this pattern runs ~25-30% directional win rate and is a reliable SKIP regardless of model tier label.

HARD CAP 9 pipeline miss: TOR@ATL pick_prob=0.8177 exceeds the 0.80 threshold but grade shows B- (1) instead of SKIP (0) — HARD CAP 9 did not fire in the pipeline; Claude Brain applied cap logic manually via DOWNGRADE.

Consecutive Stage 1/2 carry-thesis failure pattern: DET@TB f5_full_delta=0.360 mirrors June 1 (delta=0.326, DET led 7-0 through F5, rallied to win 10-9); when Stage 1 predicts >70% F5 win for the opposing side, the Stage 2 carry thesis has historically failed in back-to-back games.

Bullpen fatigue stress-warning directly invalidates Stage 2 carry thesis: TEX@STL and MIA@WSH both carry the pick-side bullpen-carry mechanism but have bullpen_fatigue flags — the carry thesis has no structural support when the pen is fatigued.

Two low-conviction CONFIRM rescues (NYM@SEA, COL@LAA): modest negative edges (-4.4pp, -8.0pp) with pre-cap B+ multi-signal stacks justify bypassing HARD CAP 10; effective grade is B- (low-conviction) after HARD CAP 1 already fired on both.

Critical: stress_warning=bullpen_fatigue means the WSH pen cannot support the Stage 2 carry, and confidence_downgrade=True. CONFIRM SKIP.
